revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24644718927|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[commons:Category:Asukada-jinja, Kakamigahara]][[ja:飛鳥田神社 (各務原市)]] {{Expand Japanese|飛鳥田神社 (各務原市)}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Asukada Shrine | native_name = 飛鳥田神社 | image = Asukada-jinja 01.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Asukada Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.426074|136.874897}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Asukada Shrine'''|飛鳥田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11609223|ltq=Q11609223|qid=Q11609223|1=List of Shikinaisha in Mino Province}} ** Series ordinal: 23 ** P155: {{ill|Q135039904|ltq=Q135039904|qid=Q135039904|1=Murakunino Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Murakuni Masumida Shrine|lt=Murakuni Masumida Shrine|ja|村国真墨田神社|qid=Q11523053|1=Murakuni Masumida Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q131900819|ltq=Q131900819|qid=Q131900819|1=Q131900819}} * {{ill|Q864156|ltq=Q864156|qid=Q864156|1=Mino Province}} * {{ill|Kakami district|lt=Kakami district|ja|各務郡|zh|各務郡|qid=Q11412369|1=Kakami district}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.426074|136.874897}} == image (P18) == * Asukada-jinja 01.jpg == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181945 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917316|ltq=Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == country (P17) == * ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == postal code (P281) == * 504-0807 == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 9200005002203 == Commons category (P373) == * Asukada-jinja, Kakamigahara == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '岐阜県各務原市蘇原清住町1丁目105-1', 'language': 'ja'} == image of entrance (P9721) == * Asukada-jinja 02.jpg {{commons category|Category:Asukada-jinja, Kakamigahara}} [[JA:飛鳥田神社 (各務原市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11665977}} == Japanese content == {{Citation needed|date=March 15, 2015 (Sun) 08:20 (UTC)}} {{Shrine | Name=Asukada Shrine | Image=[[File:Asukada-jinja 01.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall | Location={{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|qid=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kakamigahara City|Q641491|qid=Q641491|1=Kakamigahara}}{{ill|lt=Sohara Kiyozumi Town|Q131900819|qid=Q131900819|1=Sohara Kiyozumi Town}} 1-chome 105-1 | Coordinates= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | Enshrined deity=Asukada Ōkami | Shrine rank={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (minor)
Former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} | Founded=Traditionally: {{ill|lt=Taika|Q1077930|qid=Q1077930|1=Taika (era)}} 5 ({{ill|lt=649|Q31117|qid=Q31117|1=649}}) | Main hall= | Annual festival=Third Sunday of March | Rituals= | Map= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Asukada Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Asukada Shrine''' (あすかたじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|qid=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}}, {{ill|lt=Kakamigahara City|Q641491|qid=Q641491|1=Kakamigahara}}, {{ill|lt=Sohara Kiyozumi Town|Q131900819|qid=Q131900819|1=Sohara Kiyozumi Town}}. It is Asukada Shrine listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} of Kagami District, Mino Province. Under the {{ill|lt=Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|qid=Q712534|lt=former shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}, it was a gōsha (village shrine). === Overview === It is traditionally said to have been founded in {{ill|lt=Taika|Q1077930|qid=Q1077930|1=Taika (era)}} 5 ({{ill|lt=649|Q31117|qid=Q31117|1=649}}). According to one theory, the {{ill|lt=Soga clan|Q909854|qid=Q909854|1=Soga clan}}, including figures such as {{ill|lt=Soga no Kurayamada no Ishikawamaro|Q3488899|qid=Q3488899|1=Soga no Kurayamada no Ishikawa no Maro}}, once governed this area, and it is said that the place name “Sohara” derives from their possession of the land. It is presumed that the Soga clan transferred a deity from {{ill|lt=Yamato Province|Q907495|qid=Q907495|1=Yamato Province}} {{ill|lt=Asuka|Q11665953|qid=Q11665953|1=Asuka}} to this site. In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}, it is listed as Shōsanmi Asukada Shrine, and during the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|qid=Q184963|1=Edo period}} it was called Asuka Daimyōjin. === Enshrined deity === * Asukada Ōkami : The nature of the deity is unknown. There is also a theory that the enshrined deity is {{ill|lt=Iokishikihiko no Mikoto|Q11372194|qid=Q11372194|lt=Ōnakatsuhiko no Mikoto|1=Prince Inishikiirihiko}}. === Location === * 1-chome 105-1, Sohara Kiyozumi Town, Kakamigahara City, Gifu Prefecture === Transportation === * From the “Kiyozumi Town 1-chome” bus stop on the Kurachi Line of {{ill|lt=Gifu Bus|Q5560101|qid=Q5560101|lt=Gifu Noriai Bus|1=Gifu Bus}}, a 5-minute walk. * From the “Kiyozumi Town 1-chome” bus stop on the Sohara Line of the {{ill|lt=Kakamigahara City Fureai Bus|Q11412316|qid=Q11412316|1=Kakamigahara City Fureai Bus}}, a 5-minute walk. === Other === * Sohara, where Asukada Shrine is located, has deep connections with the Soga clan. One of the enshrined deities at {{ill|lt=Kassami Shrine|Q11398477|qid=Q11398477|1=Kasami Shrine}}, located about 1 km to the southeast, is {{ill|lt=Soga no Kurayamada no Ishikawamaro|Q3488899|qid=Q3488899|1=Soga no Kurayamada no Ishikawa no Maro}}. In addition, the tomb of Soga no Ishikawamaro ({{ill|lt=Alleged Tomb of Soga no Kurayamada no Ishikawamaro|Q11381424|qid=Q11381424|1=Alleged Tomb of Soga no Kurayamada no Ishikawamaro}}) and the ruins of Yamada-dera ({{ill|lt=Yamada-dera Pagoda Foundation Stone|Q11470319|qid=Q11470319|1=Yamada-dera Pagoda Foundation Stone}}) are also nearby. === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{commonscat|Asukada-jinja, Kakamigahara}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Asukada Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Asukada Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kakamigahara, Gifu]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Gifu Prefecture]]
